title: Cristiano Ronaldo
text: Cristiano Ronaldo is a Portuguese professional footballer widely regarded as one of the greatest players of all time. He has won five Ballon d'Or awards and numerous UEFA Champions League titles. Known for his incredible goal-scoring ability, athleticism, and dedication, Ronaldo has played for Sporting CP, Manchester United, Real Madrid, Juventus, and Al Nassr. His rivalry with Lionel Messi defined a generation of football.
